stemHtml: On IFR in IMC, cleared from FL370 to FL60 at the IAF for ILS runway 08. ATC asked for a report passing FL180. No acknowledgement received at FL180 and you suspect comm failure. What should you do?

options.a: Continue descent to FL60, squawk 7600, and land as soon as possible.
options.b: Continue to the destination and land within 20 minutes after ETA.
options.c: Proceed to the IAF, descend to FL60, and hold to arrive at or as close as possible to the ETA.
options.d: Maintain FL180 and fly the route to the designated navaid.
